Bash(# Test full recommendation with commute — fresh timing test
time curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4000/recommendations \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{
    "home": { "postal": "425304" },
    "mustHaves": {},
    "goodToHaves": { "rankedCriteria": ["commute","ccas","programmes"] }
  }' | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
results = d['data']['results']
for r in results:
  s = r['school']
  c = r['commute']
  bd = {b['criterion']:b for b in r['breakdown']}
  print\(f\\"{s['name'][:40]}: commute={c['durationMins']}min score={bd.get\('commute',{}\).get\('score',0\):.2f} ccas_score={bd.get\('ccas',{}\).get\('score',0\):.2f} prog_score={bd.get\('programmes',{}\).get\('score',0\):.2f}\\"\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(JAVA=/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/temurin-21.jdk/Contents/Home/bin/java
DOCS=/Users/samuel/Documents/SC2006-TCE2-G26/Optima/docs/diagrams

$JAVA -jar /tmp/plantuml.jar -tpng -o "$DOCS" "$DOCS/class-diagram.puml" 2>&1 && echo "class-diagram: OK"
$JAVA -jar /tmp/plantuml.jar -tpng -o "$DOCS" "$DOCS/dialog-map.puml" 2>&1 && echo "dialog-map: OK"
$JAVA -jar /tmp/plantuml.jar -tpng -o "$DOCS" "$DOCS/use-case.puml" 2>&1 && echo "use-case: OK")
